content_preview.title: TikTok Seeks Brazilian Central Bank Approval to Offer Payments and Lending Through Its App
content_preview.summary: ByteDance has applied for two fintech licenses in Brazil that would let TikTok issue prepaid accounts and extend credit to its 131 million adult users, marking the platform's most ambitious push into financial services outside China.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

TikTok, the short-video platform controlled by China's ByteDance, has applied for two financial licenses with Brazil's central bank, according to a [Reuters exclusive](https://www.reuters.com/technology/tiktok-seeks-brazil-fintech-license-offer-credit-2026-03-31/) published on March 31. If approved, the licenses would allow TikTok to offer prepaid digital wallets and consumer lending services directly within its app — a move that would transform the social media platform into a fina...
